revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing automatically generrated pages

revision.text:
{{documentation subpage}} {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Script/styles klingon.css}} === Usage === This template marks a string as [[Klingon alphabets|pIqaD]]. It is transcluded by {{tl|script}}. Do not include this template directly, but instead use: {{tlx|script|Piqd|ŌĆ╣Klingon script stringŌĆ║}}. === Under the hood === This template contains 
{{{1}}}
The class="script-klingon" allows users to specify their own style for Klingon script by including a custom font declaration for .script-klingon in their user CSS, see [[Help:User style]]. Proper display of the characters is achieved by explicit font declarations. === Example === Placing a Klingon string in {{tl|script}}: {{tlx|script|Piqd|’ŻĀ’ŻÉ’Ż×’ŻÖ’ŻÉ}} The result will be a span with a class attribute, like this: ’ŻĀ’ŻÉ’Ż×’ŻÖ’ŻÉ Which appears in your browser as: : {{script|Piqd|’ŻĀ’ŻÉ’Ż×’ŻÖ’ŻÉ}} Without {{tl|script}}: : ’ŻĀ’ŻÉ’Ż×’ŻÖ’ŻÉ Please mark all Klingon text with {{tlx|script|Piqd}}. This will allow users to format all examples of Klingon text consistently, with their choice of fonts, colours, etc. {{sandbox other|| [[Category:ScriptŌĆōfont templates|K]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{documentation subpage}} {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Script/styles klingon.css}} === Usage === This template marks a string as [[Klingon alphabets|pIqaD]]. It is transcluded by {{tl|script}}. The class="script-klingon" allows users to specify their own style for Klingon script by including a custom font declaration for .script-klingon in their user CSS, see [[Help:User style]]. Proper display of the characters is achieved by explicit font declarations. === Example === Placing a Klingon string in {{tl|script}}: {{tlx|script|Piqd|’ŻĀ’ŻÉ’Ż×’ŻÖ’ŻÉ}} The result will be a span with a class attribute, like this: ’ŻĀ’ŻÉ’Ż×’ŻÖ’ŻÉ Which appears in your browser as: : {{script|Piqd|’ŻĀ’ŻÉ’Ż×’ŻÖ’ŻÉ}} Without {{tl|script}}: : ’ŻĀ’ŻÉ’Ż×’ŻÖ’ŻÉ Please mark all Klingon text with {{tlx|script|Piqd}}. This will allow users to format all examples of Klingon text consistently, with their choice of fonts, colours, etc. {{sandbox other|| [[Category:ScriptŌĆōfont templates|K]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "ŌåĄ<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{documentation subpage}} {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Script/styles klingon.css}} === Usage === This template marks a string as [[Klingon alphabets|pIqaD]]. It is transcluded by {{tl|script}}. Do not include this template directly, but instead use: {{tlx|script|Piqd|ŌĆ╣Klingon script stringŌĆ║}}. === Under the hood === This template contains 
{{{1}}}
The class="script-klingon" allows users to specify their own style for Klingon script by including a custom font declaration for .script-klingon in their user CSS, see [[Help:User style]]. Proper display of the characters is achieved by explicit font declarations. === Example === Placing a Klingon string in {{tl|script}}: {{tlx|script|Piqd|’ŻĀ’ŻÉ’Ż×’ŻÖ’ŻÉ}} The result will be a span with a class attribute, like this: ’ŻĀ’ŻÉ’Ż×’ŻÖ’ŻÉ Which appears in your browser as: : {{script|Piqd|’ŻĀ’ŻÉ’Ż×’ŻÖ’ŻÉ}} Without {{tl|script}}: : ’ŻĀ’ŻÉ’Ż×’ŻÖ’ŻÉ Please mark all Klingon text with {{tlx|script|Piqd}}. This will allow users to format all examples of Klingon text consistently, with their choice of fonts, colours, etc. {{sandbox other|| [[Category:ScriptŌĆōfont templates|K]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{documentation subpage}} {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Script/styles klingon.css}} === Usage === This template marks a string as [[Klingon alphabets|pIqaD]]. It is transcluded by {{tl|script}}. Do not include this template directly, but instead use: {{tlx|script|Piqd|ŌĆ╣Klingon script stringŌĆ║}}. === Under the hood === This template contains 
{{{1}}}
The class="script-klingon" allows users to specify their own style for Klingon script by including a custom font declaration for .script-klingon in their user CSS, see [[Help:User style]]. Proper display of the characters is achieved by explicit font declarations. === Example === Placing a Klingon string in {{tl|script}}: {{tlx|script|Piqd|’ŻĀ’ŻÉ’Ż×’ŻÖ’ŻÉ}} The result will be a span with a class attribute, like this: ’ŻĀ’ŻÉ’Ż×’ŻÖ’ŻÉ Which appears in your browser as: : {{script|Piqd|’ŻĀ’ŻÉ’Ż×’ŻÖ’ŻÉ}} Without {{tl|script}}: : ’ŻĀ’ŻÉ’Ż×’ŻÖ’ŻÉ Please mark all Klingon text with {{tlx|script|Piqd}}. This will allow users to format all examples of Klingon text consistently, with their choice of fonts, colours, etc. {{sandbox other|| [[Category:ScriptŌĆōfont templates|K]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23582763848|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{documentation subpage}} {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Script/styles klingon.css}} === Usage === This template marks a string as [[Klingon alphabets|pIqaD]]. It is transcluded by {{tl|script}}. Do not include this template directly, but instead use: {{tlx|script|Piqd|ŌĆ╣Klingon script stringŌĆ║}}. === Under the hood === This template contains 
{{{1}}}
The class="script-klingon" allows users to specify their own style for Klingon script by including a custom font declaration for .script-klingon in their user CSS, see [[Help:User style]]. Proper display of the characters is achieved by explicit font declarations. === Example === Placing a Klingon string in {{tl|script}}: {{tlx|script|Piqd|’ŻĀ’ŻÉ’Ż×’ŻÖ’ŻÉ}} The result will be a span with a class attribute, like this: ’ŻĀ’ŻÉ’Ż×’ŻÖ’ŻÉ Which appears in your browser as: : {{script|Piqd|’ŻĀ’ŻÉ’Ż×’ŻÖ’ŻÉ}} Without {{tl|script}}: : ’ŻĀ’ŻÉ’Ż×’ŻÖ’ŻÉ Please mark all Klingon text with {{tlx|script|Piqd}}. This will allow users to format all examples of Klingon text consistently, with their choice of fonts, colours, etc. {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:ScriptŌĆōfont templates|K]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
